violations.text: A deceased mouse was observed on a trap in the dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The floor/wall junctures in the dry storage area, ware washing area, and boiler room have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2024
